/*
 * LVDS PANEL Initialization Script
 *
 * Date            : 2024/7/11
 * Chip Type       : IT9860
 * Resolution      : 1920x720
 * Color format    : RGB888
 * PANEL interface : VESA 24-bits
 * Build version   : PANEL initial script editor Ver. 0.0.0.378
 * SHA1 hash       : a1bb6f2183bfce2080db69622dc1a194c9c09a60
 */

/* ************************************************* */
/*               Please don't remove!                */
/* ************************************************* */
/*@@*/

/* ************************************************* */
/*               GPIO Mode0 Set/Clear                */
/* ************************************************* */
//GPIO65 BL POWER //GPIO16 Reset
//GPIO18 PWM
WRITE(0xD1000008, 0x00010000);    // GPIO[31: 0] GPIO16 set dir output
//WRITE(0xD1000008, 0x00050000);    // GPIO[31: 0] GPIO16, GPIO18 set dir output
//WRITE(0xD1000108, 0x00000002);    // GPIO[95:64] GPIO65 set dir output
//WRITE(0xD100010C, 0x00000002);    // GPIO[95:64] GPIO65 set high
//Wait(10);
//WRITE(0xD100000C, 0x00040000);    // GPIO[31: 0] GPIO18 set high
Wait(15000);
WRITE(0xD1000010, 0x00010000);    // GPIO[31: 0] GPIO16 clear
Wait(15000);
WRITE(0xD100000C, 0x00010000);    // GPIO[31: 0] GPIO16 set high
Wait(10000);

/* ************************************************* */
/*    IT9860, LVDS Interface mode, Clock Setting     */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD8000028, 0x002ac801);

/* ************************************************* */
/*              PLL3 ck3_n1, 0xD8000000              */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD8000120, 0x20500A01);
WRITE(0xD8000124, 0x80000000);
WRITE(0xD8000124, 0xF3000000);
wait(220);                        // IDLE 220
WRITE(0xD8000124, 0x80000000);

/* ************************************************* */
/*            General Setting 0xd000_0000            */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD0000000, 0x00000070);    // DRAM mode, dclk, Falling latch
WRITE(0xD0000004, 0x0F7F3A60);    // SRC:RGB888, dst VESA 24-bits
WRITE(0xD0000008, 0x02D00780);    // Layer1:W1920xH720
WRITE(0xD000000C, 0x00001E00);    // pitch=1920 X 4=7680
WRITE(0xD0000010, 0x00000000);    // baseA addr
WRITE(0xD0000014, 0x00000000);    // baseB addr
WRITE(0xD0000018, 0x00000000);    // baseC addr

/* ************************************************* */
/*                  Test Color Mode                  */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD0000020, 0x000000FF);    // test color mode=0, None

/* ************************************************* */
/*             Port Setting 0xD000_0000              */
/*    HS:32, HBP:32, HFP:64, VS:8, VBP:8, VFP:45     */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD0000070, 0x00010300);    // ctg_reset_on
wait(1);                          // 1 μs
WRITE(0xD0000070, 0x00000300);    // ctg_reset_off

WRITE(0xD0000070, 0x00000307);    // enable ctg 0 1 2
WRITE(0xD0000074, 0x030D0800);    // HTotal=0x0800, VTotal=0x030D
//CTG0(Hsync)
WRITE(0xD0000078, 0x20010800);    // set0,p1, line x=HTotal,        y=1
WRITE(0xD000007C, 0x10010020);    // set1,p2       x=HOR.SYNC TIME, y=1
WRITE(0xD0000080, 0x00000000);    // set0,p3(0x0,0)
WRITE(0xD0000084, 0x00000000);    // set0,p4(0x0,0)
//CTG1(Vsync)
WRITE(0xD0000088, 0x60010800);    // set0,p1 ,frame  x=HTotal, y=1
WRITE(0xD000008C, 0x10090800);    // set1,p2         x=HTotal, y=VER.SYNC TIME+1
WRITE(0xD0000090, 0x00000000);    // set0,p3(0x0,0)
WRITE(0xD0000094, 0x00000000);    // set0,p4(0x0,0)
//CTG2(DE)
WRITE(0xD0000098, 0x10120040);    // set1,p1, line
WRITE(0xD000009C, 0x22E207C0);    // set0,p2 x=HOR.SYNC TIME+HBP+Hor. display area y=(VER.SYNC TIME+1)+VBP+1+Ver. display area
WRITE(0xD00000A0, 0x10120040);    // set1,p3
WRITE(0xD00000A4, 0x22E207C0);    // set0,p4

/* ************************************************* */
/*                     LVDS PHY                      */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD0D00000, 0x384085E4);    // PLLNS=28 0x1C, Pad Type=LVDS, [23:22]='01':LVDS,[8]:LDOPD
WRITE(0xD0D00004, 0x01008064);    // PLLF=1, PLLMS=4
WRITE(0xD0D0001C, 0x00040000);    // PLLCLKSEL=DCLK for LVDS
WRITE(0xD0D00000, 0x394085E4);    // PLL ENABLE
Wait(1);
// Software reset
WRITE(0xD0D00004, 0x015E8064);    // CLKEN,DATAEN
WRITE(0xD0D00004, 0x015F8064);    // RESET
WAIT(1);
WRITE(0xD0D00004, 0x015E8064);    // normal
WAIT(200);


/* ************************************************* */
/*                       LVDS                        */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD00001C0, 0x23410631);    // Enable LVDS
WRITE(0xD00001C8, 0x00000000);    // [4:0]P/N swap
WAIT(35);

/* ************************************************* */
/*                   Enable PANEL                    */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD000001C, 0x00000001);    // SyncEn
wait(1); // IDLE 1                // 1 μs
WRITE(0xD000001C, 0x00000003);    // SyncEn DisplayEn
